top_10.rationale: Direct PDF — foundational TKDE survey 'Self-supervised Learning: Generative or Contrastive'. University-hosted PDF, comprehensive coverage of contrastive and generative SSL methods.
Direct NeurIPS PDF — 'Supervised Contrastive Learning'. Official NeurIPS 2020 proceedings paper PDF on supervised contrastive learning, the key extension of contrastive SSL.
Direct Springer PDF — 'Contrastive Self-supervised Learning: Review, Progress, Challenges'. Comprehensive review covering autoencoders, contrastive methods, and SSL frameworks.
Direct university-hosted PDF — 'Contrastive Self-Supervised Learning: A Survey on Different Architectures'. Survey covering generative + contrastive SSL integration.
Direct CVPR 2024 Open Access PDF — 'Self-Supervised Representation Learning from Arbitrary Scenarios'. Combines contrastive learning and masked image modeling. Official conference paper PDF.
Direct Frontiers PDF — 'Contrastive self-supervised representation learning without negative samples'. Open-access journal PDF on multimodal contrastive SSL framework.
Direct arXiv PDF — 'Understanding Self-supervised Contrastive Learning through Supervised'. PDF format, covers prototype representation bias and balanced contrastive loss.
ICML 2020 PMLR proceedings page for SimCLR 'A Simple Framework for Contrastive Learning of Visual Representations' — official conference proceedings page with PDF download link.
arXiv abstract page for 'Supervised Contrastive Learning' (Khosla et al.) — arXiv abstract with full PDF available. Key extension of contrastive learning to supervised settings.
arXiv DOI for SimCLR 'A Simple Framework for Contrastive Learning of Visual Representations' — canonical foundational paper with arXiv PDF available.
